title: Reduce Knee Swelling with These 10 Amazing Herbal Essential Oils
description: Hamamelis virginiana essential oil, also known as witch hazel, is a natural remedy for knee swelling. This oil has anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce swelling and ease pain in the affected area. It contains a compound called salicin, a natural pain reliever similar to aspirin. When applied topically, witch hazel oil can help reduce inflammation and promote healing in the joints.
